# Neslib.FastMath

This repository does not vendor Neslib.FastMath.

- Upstream: https://github.com/neslib/FastMath
- License: See the upstream `License.txt`
- Used by: math, rendering, physics, animation, scripting, and editor units
- Local path expected by the Delphi project: provide `Neslib.FastMath` on the
  Delphi library path or vendor it under `External/Neslib.FastMath/`

Download or clone the dependency from upstream before building. If you vendor it
in this repository later, keep the upstream license file and copyright notices.
